instruction: Implement a DeepBook PTB script to prepare a multisig transaction for managing coin types across various environments.

"Implement a DeepBook margin pool configuration script that initializes multiple margin pools (SUI, USDC, DEEP, WAL, SUI_USDE, XBTC) with their respective admin capabilities and margin registry settings."
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script that prepares a multisig transaction for managing subnames in the MVR AppCaps registry."
Implement a DeepBook margin liquidation operation to create a liquidation vault using the specified admin capabilities.
"Create a DeepBook permissionless pool transaction for trading COIN_A against COIN_B with specified tick size, lot size, and minimum order size."
Create a DeepBook PTB that sets up two trading pools: one for SUI/USDSUI with standard parameters and another for USDSUI/USDC as a stable pool.
Implement a DeepBook market maker class that initializes with a keypair and environment, supports signing transactions, and includes a flash loan example.
"Implement a script to disable multiple DeepBook margin pools using the marginAdmin capability."
"Implement a DeepBook margin admin transaction to disable a specific version using the admin capability."
Implement a DeepBook admin transaction to disable a specific protocol version using multisig authorization.
"Implement a DeepBook margin admin transaction to disable versions 3 and 4, then mint and distribute 5 CorePauseCaps to specified addresses."
Implement a DeepBook margin admin transaction to enable a specific version of the margin pool.
Implement a DeepBook admin operation to enable a specific version and update allowed versions for multiple trading pairs on the mainnet.
Implement a DeepBook PTB script to supply 99k USDC into the Abyss Vault using the `abyss_vault::supply` operation.
"Implement a DeepBook supply transaction using the Abyss Vault protocol to deposit SUI_USDE tokens into the margin pool."
Implement a DeepBook margin liquidation deposit transaction for 50,000 USDC into the specified vault using the liquidation admin cap.
"Implement a DeepBook transaction to initialize the BalanceManagerMap using the admin capability."
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script to set git versioning metadata for the mainnet deployment using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK."
Implement a mainnet protocol upgrade for the DeepBook package using a specified gas object and upgrade capability.
"Implement a Move call to transfer package metadata ownership to a holding address using the DeepBook SDK, preparing the transaction for multisig approval."
"Implement a margin package upgrade transaction using DeepBook's BalanceManager with a specified gas object and fixed gas price."
Implement a DeepBook admin transaction to disable margin versions 3 and 4, then mint and distribute 5 core pause caps to specified addresses.
Implement git versioning updates for the DeepBook margin trading package, setting versions 2 and 3 with their respective commit SHAs.
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script to prepare a multisig transaction for managing app capabilities using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK."
"Implement a Sui Move Registry transaction using DeepBook's BalanceManager to interact with app capabilities across core, subnames-proxy, metadata, and public-names modules."
Implement a DeepBook metadata update transaction using package_info::set_metadata to update repository and version information for specified packages.
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script to unset metadata from the Move registry using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK."
"Implement a Move registry registration transaction using DeepBook's core module to register a kiosk domain, transferring the resulting app capability to a specified owner address."
"Implement a DeepBook metadata update transaction that sets package info, display properties, and git versioning for a Kiosk UpgradeCap."
Implement a Move Registry transaction to set icon URLs for Nautilus and Seal app capabilities using the MVR core module.
"Implement a DeepBook transaction to set package metadata versioning using git repository information."
Implement a DeepBook transaction to create and transfer a `PackageInfo` object with metadata display settings to a specified holding address using the `@mvr/metadata` package.
Create a multisig transaction to transfer a Nautilus PackageInfo object to a holding address after setting its display metadata.
Implement a TypeScript script to interact with DeepBook's margin pool supply functionality using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK.
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script that registers a payment-kit Move module with metadata using the Move registry."
"Implement a DeepBook transaction to create and share two BalanceManager instances using the mainnet configuration."
"Implement a DeepBook margin admin transaction to revoke a pause capability using the specified pauseCap ID."
"Implement a DeepBook transaction to set metadata and versioning for a denylist package using the specified repository and commit SHA."
"Implement a DeepBook admin transaction to enable version 8 for core and version 5 for margin, then authorize the margin package."
"Implement a DeepBook margin pool supply transaction to deposit USDC using the admin capability."
"Implement a DeepBook PTB script to transfer tokens (SUI, DEEP, or USDC) to a specified receiving address using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK."
Transfer all MVR app capabilities and package info objects to a specified holding address using a multisig transaction.
"Implement a DeepBook admin transaction to unregister existing WUSDC/USDC and WUSDT/USDC pools, then create new pools with updated tick sizes and configurations."
Implement a script to fetch and process all DeepBook pool creation events from the mainnet indexer endpoint.
"Implement a DeepBook margin maintainer configuration update for USDC and SUI pools, setting interest rate parameters and pool supply caps while using the admin capabilities."
Implement a DeepBook admin operation to adjust the minimum lot size for the `USDSUI_USDC` trading pair using a multisig transaction.
Implement a DeepBook admin operation to adjust the tick size for the SUI_USDC trading pair.
Implement a script to upgrade the margin liquidation vault package using a specified gas object and serialize the unsigned transaction for execution.
"Implement a DeepBook transaction to unset git versioning metadata for a Move package using the @mysten/deepbook-v3 SDK."
